subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One of all things possible, Who, amidst the tumults of sorrows, raised high the banner of utterance, while a pack of wolves [pursued] His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود امکانرا که در بحبوحه احزان رایه بیان برافراخت شرذمه ذئاب اولیائش را
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action
